# OVÉ — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org

> OVÉ is a pre-launch investing concept exploring a simpler way to get started with investing. Built for people who haven't started yet. Not a live product or authorised service.

## About

OVÉ is developed by Samuel Gustaf, based in Halmstad, Sweden. It is a conceptual exploration of what a simpler investing experience could look like — designed for the large share of Europeans who have savings but have never invested.

OVÉ is not currently authorised to provide investment services. No regulated partner is currently engaged. Nothing on this site constitutes an offer, invitation, or advice to invest.

## Pages

- [Home](https://meetove.pro/index): Overview of the concept and what OVÉ is exploring.
- [Concept](https://meetove.pro/concept): An illustrative walkthrough of how a simpler investing experience could feel. Educational only — no real accounts, no money moved.
- [Learn — The €10.8 Trillion Gap](https://meetove.pro/learn): Why 74% of Europeans don't invest. Covers the €10.8 trillion household deposit gap, three barriers to investing (complexity, jargon, fear), EU investor protections under MiFID II, UCITS index funds vs cash savings, and the European Commission's Savings and Investments Union. Sources: ESMA Trends, Risks and Vulnerabilities Report 2025/2026, ECB Sector Accounts Q3 2025, BlackRock People & Money Survey 2024.
- [Invest or Save Monthly?](https://meetove.pro/learn/invest-or-save): Data-driven comparison of saving vs investing monthly. Shows what inflation does to €10,000 over 10 years at 2-3% inflation, why every European savings account type paid below the 2.5% inflation rate in 2025, and the historical difference between a savings account (€12,150 after 10 years on €12,000 invested) and a global index fund (€22,593) using MSCI World data. Includes EU27 HICP inflation chart 2015-2025 showing the 10.7% 2022 peak. Sources: ECB Banking Statistics December 2025, Eurostat HICP, MSCI World Factsheet February 2026, ECB HFCS, ESMA Retail Investor Journey Report 2025/2026.
- [Waitlist](https://meetove.pro/waitlist): Mailing list for product concept updates only.
- [Regulatory](https://meetove.pro/regulatory): How OVÉ thinks about compliance, MiFID II, and investor protection.

## Not included

- /demo — excluded (illustrative simulation, not for indexing)
- /vision — excluded (private)

## Legal

This website is for informational and illustrative purposes only. It does not constitute investment advice, an offer, or a solicitation. Investing involves risk, including loss of capital.
